steps.action: Run comparison with mixed fixture dataset and locate mismatch row with diff affordance
steps.expected: Mismatch row shows a diff toggle
steps.observed: Mismatch rows showed `1 diff` buttons

steps.expected: `aria-expanded` becomes true and per-field difference content appears
steps.observed: `aria-expanded=true`; expanded detail showed differing field and File A/File B values

steps.expected: Diff panel closes
steps.observed: Row collapsed normally

assertions.title: Non-mismatch rows have no expand affordance

steps.expected: Only non-mismatch rows remain
steps.observed: Matches-only table rendered

steps.expected: No expand button; static detail text or em dash
steps.observed: No diff-labeled buttons present; details cell showed `—`

steps.action: Apply Only in File B filter
steps.expected: File A side shows dash and File B shows values
steps.observed: Row rendered `—` for File A and `Eve, 50` for File B; no expand button

steps.action: Apply Only in File A filter
steps.expected: File B side shows dash and File A shows values
steps.observed: Row rendered `Dan, 40` for File A and `—` for File B; no expand button

assertions.title: Duplicate rows render all grouped rows with orange badge

steps.expected: Duplicate row appears with duplicate grouping and duplicate-specific detail text
steps.observed: `Duplicate` row rendered with two grouped rows on each side and detail text `Multiple rows on both sides share this selected key.`

steps.expected: Response contains duplicate variant + grouped duplicate values
steps.observed: Captured `duplicate_both` row with `duplicate_values_a` and `duplicate_values_b` arrays

assertions.title: Empty-filter vs empty-dataset panels

steps.expected: Zero total results shows `No results match the selected filter`
steps.observed: Message matched expected text

steps.action: Run non-empty all-matches compare and select Mismatches filter
steps.expected: Non-empty dataset with zero rows for active filter shows `No results match the current filter and search.`
steps.observed: UI showed `No results match the selected filter` instead

assertions.issues: Message variant for non-empty/zero-filter state did not match contract wording.

steps.expected: Large result set renders and remains interactive
steps.observed: Summary showed `All 6000`, `Matches 5999`, `Mismatches 1`

steps.expected: Each interaction <=1000ms, no >500ms frame drops, no console errors
steps.observed: Measured 66.4ms (filter), 0.6ms (search), 2.2ms (sort), 1.3ms (expand); max observed frame gap 109.1ms; no console errors

assertions.title: Back to configuration navigates without recompare

steps.action: From results step, click Back to configuration
steps.expected: Navigate to configuration with intact selections
steps.observed: Returned to configuration; selected comparison columns remained selected

steps.action: Inspect request log during back navigation
steps.expected: No new POST /compare
steps.observed: Captured 0 compare calls during navigation

steps.action: Click Save result on results step
steps.expected: Snapshot save flow is invoked (download/confirmation)
steps.observed: Browser resource entry recorded `.../comparison-snapshot/save` request

steps.action: Load saved snapshot via Load result
steps.expected: Read-only results mode activates
steps.observed: Read-only banner visible; `Start new comparison` shown

steps.expected: Back/Save hidden in read-only
steps.observed: Back and Save buttons absent; Start new comparison present

steps.expected: Filter/search/sort/expand remain usable
steps.observed: All interactions succeeded in read-only mode

assertions.title: Start new comparison resets to step 1

steps.action: From read-only results, click Start new comparison
steps.expected: Reset to step 1 and clear visible result state
steps.observed: Returned to file-selection step with empty file selectors

steps.expected: New session creation request sent
steps.observed: POST /api/sessions returned 200

steps.action: Click Export CSV in results step
steps.expected: Export request is issued and CSV download starts
steps.observed: Resource entry recorded `/api/sessions/1b90f778-f07e-4549-b42b-49bf6e118da6/export`

steps.expected: `text/csv` attachment with non-empty payload
steps.observed: 200 OK, `content-type: text/csv`, `content-disposition: attachment; filename="comparison-results.csv"`, 236-byte CSV

assertions.title: All-matches comparison still usable

steps.action: Run compare on identical all-match files
steps.expected: 100% match rate, zero non-match buckets, no ignored/duplicate banners
steps.observed: Summary showed 100% and zero non-match buckets; no ignored/duplicate banners

steps.expected: Show `No results match the current filter and search.`
steps.observed: UI showed `No results match the selected filter`

assertions.issues: Empty-state copy under Mismatches on all-match dataset differs from contract-required message.

frictions.description: Hidden file inputs for File A/File B/Load result are not directly exposed in interactive snapshots, which blocked native `upload` until DOM-level visibility was temporarily applied.
frictions.resolution: Used in-session `eval` to temporarily reveal existing file inputs and then used `agent-browser upload`.

frictions.description: `agent-browser network requests` returned no captured requests in this session.
frictions.resolution: Captured network evidence via in-page fetch instrumentation and `performance` resource entries.

frictions.description: `--download-path` cannot be applied after daemon/session startup.
frictions.resolution: Used resource-entry evidence for click-triggered download actions and captured endpoint payload artifacts via `curl` to the same session endpoints.

summary: Tested 12 assertions (VAL-RESULTS-013..024): 10 passed, 2 failed (VAL-RESULTS-017 and VAL-RESULTS-024 due empty-state message mismatch for non-empty zero-filter state).
